prompt: Generate a screenshot of a Snapchat-like app interface showing a user (from the first image) taking a photo with a filter applied (from the second image)
prompt_refined: Generate a full-screen screenshot of a mobile camera app interface, similar to Snapchat. The main camera view should prominently feature the person from image 1 (Brad Pitt) actively looking into the camera, with the animal ear and nose filter from image 2 precisely applied over his face. Include typical app UI elements such as a large circular shutter button centered at the bottom, and other functional icons for flash, camera flip, and filter selection positioned around the screen.
objects: Brad Pitt actively looking into the camera
Animal ear filter applied over Brad Pitt's face
Animal nose filter applied over Brad Pitt's face
Large circular shutter button centered at the bottom
